summary: Role 8 reviewed the revised remaining-gaps consensus plan against the Observatory implementation, graph/memory-audit docs, and current health/status artifacts. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because the plan names the right UI lanes but does not yet define a concrete Observatory data contract, endpoint/schema requirements, artifact ingestion, proof-link semantics, or UI/API verification tests; current Observatory code also does not ingest health_status/client_mcp_direct/monitoring status as the unified blocker model.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED rather than AGREE for Role 8.
Treat current implementation gaps as evidence that the plan needs stronger UI/observability acceptance criteria, not as a request to edit code in this pass.
next_steps: Revise P1-11 to define the Observatory blocker-model data contract and required artifact sources.

Require /api/state or an equivalent endpoint to expose health_status checks, client_mcp_direct status, proof_path, latest_verified_at, stale_after_ms, visible_status, warnings, reviewer/main/verifier pending lanes, and per-gate UI links.
Add API/browser/screenshot acceptance tests that fail when a P0 proof is missing but not visible in Observatory, when status artifacts are invalid JSON, or when health CLI and UI disagree.
